name: fish-automate-tms-scholarship
description: Fullstack monorepo for TMS scholarship automation.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @fish/shared build && pnpm --filter @fish/api build && pnpm --filter @fish/automation build && pnpm --filter @fish/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @fish/shared test && pnpm --filter @fish/api test -- --runInBand && pnpm --filter @fish/web test
